category_sources: source_facts.description says it counts lines of code in many languages; official homepage describes SLOCCount as tools for counting physical source lines of code.
display_name_sources: Official homepage title and text use SLOCCount; source_facts.name is sloccount.
docs_sources: Official homepage links to extensive SLOCCount documentation and serves as the project documentation/download page.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official homepage says maintenance and support transitioned to SourceForge with a public SCM system.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies line counting; official homepage documents language detection and effort/time/cost estimation.
